overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a rainy nighttime scene in a historic New Orleans-style district. The character traverses wet cobblestone streets illuminated by warm gas lamps, passing tram shelters and historic buildings with cast iron balconies, before entering a formal garden with a central fountain.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic district cobblestone street with tram shelter

events.description: character turns right at the street corner

agents.ego_description: walking down the wet cobblestone street past a covered tram shelter

entered.detail: multi-story building with illuminated windows and balconies
covered wooden shelter for streetcar passengers
cast iron lamp post with warm glowing light
stone building with arched doorways and wooden crates outside

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a rain-slicked cobblestone street in a historic district, passing a tram shelter on the left. Warm gas lamps illuminate the scene as the character approaches and turns right at a corner, with historic buildings lining both sides of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along historic building with cast iron balcony

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beside a historic building with ornate iron railings

entered.detail: two-story building with prominent wooden balcony and cast iron railings, warm light from windows

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow sidewalk next to a historic building featuring an ornate cast iron balcony. The wet cobblestones reflect the warm glow of gas street lamps as rain continues to fall. The building's windows emit a golden light, contrasting with the dark blue night.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approaching formal garden entrance with iron fencing

events.description: approaching the gated entrance to the formal park

agents.ego_description: walking along the street approaching a gated park entrance with iron fencing

entered.detail: black wrought iron fence with stone pillars marking the park boundary
ornate iron gate entrance to the garden with stone steps

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the historic street, the character approaches an ornate iron fence and gated entrance to a formal garden. The cobblestone street gives way to a paved approach as the character nears the park entrance, with the balcony building now behind and the garden ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal garden with central fountain and flower beds

events.description: entering the park through the iron gate, scene opens to garden

agents.ego_description: walking through the park entrance toward the illuminated central fountain

entered.detail: large illuminated fountain with water feature at the garden center
circular flower bed with red and pink blooms
wooden park bench along the dirt path
tall palm tree trunk with fronds

segments.scene_description: The character enters through the iron gate into a formal garden, transitioning from the enclosed street to an open park space. A large illuminated fountain dominates the center of the garden, surrounded by flower beds, palm trees, and benches. The dirt path leads toward the fountain as rain continues to fall in the warm lamplight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked historic district that gradually opens into a luminous formal garden. It begins with the character walking down a cobblestone street past a tram shelter, guided by the warm glow of gas lamps before turning a corner. As the camera follows along a narrow sidewalk, the scene emphasizes the contrast between the dark blue night and the golden light spilling from windows and reflecting off ornate cast iron balconies. The movement then shifts toward an ornate iron fence as the cobblestones give way to a paved approach, leaving the enclosed street behind. Finally, the camera passes through a gated entrance into an open park space, where a large illuminated fountain stands centered among palm trees and flower beds under the falling rain.
